name: config init refuses to overwrite an existing ctp.config.yaml unless --force is given
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/config.sh" init >/dev/null 2>&1 && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/config.sh" init 2>e.txt; ec=$?; [ "$ec" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'use --force' e.txt && echo init-refuses-overwrite 1>&2
